title: Add fit_prior parameter to discrete Naive Bayes estimators (Multinomial, Bernoulli, Complement, Categorical)
description:
sklearn discrete NB classifiers have fit_prior: bool = True. When False, class priors are uniform (1/n_classes) instead of empirical class frequencies.

ferrolearn-bayes currently always learns priors from data unless with_class_prior() is set. Add with_fit_prior(bool) builder + Default true behavior. When fit_prior=False AND class_prior=None, use uniform priors.

Affected: MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB, ComplementNB, CategoricalNB. (GaussianNB does not have fit_prior in sklearn.)
